description: Stable row identifier from the owner/source package.
Dataset, licensor, venue, or owner-approved source name.
Entity approving the label export or source-native label policy.
License, written permission, or export approval reference.

Chronological period bucket used for train/calibration/test separation.
Market context or provider/source context for the row.
Owner-approved URL, local intake path, or manifest reference.
Dataset hash, source package version, or signed export id.
